input.prompt: A dual-arm tabletop manipulation scene viewed from above. The task is to pick up one white circular object from the center bin and place it into the right blue bin.
frame_prompts: Initial frame: both robot grippers hover above the bins.
The right gripper moves toward a white circular object.
The right gripper aligns around the object.
The right gripper grasps the object.
The right gripper lifts the object.
